cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 4.3.1.0)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0091 NEW)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0141 OLD)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0184 OLD)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0128 OLD)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0197 OLD)
project(CMAKE_TRY_COMPILE CXX)
set_property(DIRECTORY PROPERTY INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES "")
set(CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE 1)
set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS "/DWIN32 /D_WINDOWS /EHsc")
set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS "${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS} ${COMPILE_DEFINITIONS}")
set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG "/Zi /Ob0 /Od /RTC1")
set(CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS "/machine:x64")
set(CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS "${CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS} ${EXE_LINKER_FLAGS}")
include_directories(${INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES})
set(CMAKE_SUPPRESS_REGENERATION 1)
link_directories(${LINK_DIRECTORIES})
cmake_policy(SET CMP0083 NEW)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0155 OLD)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0157 OLD)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0181 OLD)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0210 OLD)
include("${CMAKE_ROOT}/Modules/Internal/HeaderpadWorkaround.cmake")
set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "C:/Users/pc/Desktop/projeler/Codexprojeler/build-ninja/CMakeFiles/CMakeScratch/TryCompile-9nal44")
add_executable(cmTC_c19f0)
target_sources(cmTC_c19f0 PRIVATE
  "C:/Program Files/CMake/share/cmake-4.3/Modules/CMakeCXXCompilerABI.cpp"
)
file(GENERATE OUTPUT "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/cmTC_c19f0_loc"
     CONTENT $<TARGET_FILE:cmTC_c19f0>)
target_link_libraries(cmTC_c19f0 ${LINK_LIBRARIES})
